alkylation reagent: alkylation of the reduced thiol groups was done with 50 mmol/L iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: alkylation of the reduced thiol groups was done with 50 mmol/L iodoacetamide
fragmentation method: fragmented using CID in the ion trap
instrument: coupled to Thermo Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer
labeling: Dimethyl labeling was performed according to a published protocol
